title: GENARCH Annual Report 2026
summary: Annual summary of atlas updates, data sources, and community engagement for 2026.
content:
## GENARCH Annual Report 2026

This report summarizes the GENARCH atlas updates for 2026.

### Highlights
- Curated disease profiles with genetic architecture and exposure modifiers
- Exposure definitions and system-level effects
- Gene and pathway annotations
- Mechanism briefs explaining GxE hypotheses
- Knowledge graph of entity relationships
- Community module foundations

### Data Sources
- GWAS Catalog, GTEx, literature curation
- See /methods for full pipeline documentation
